caption: A screen recording displays a web browser window open to RANDOM.ORG, showing a "Dice Roller" result where two dice were rolled, both showing three dots. The page includes a timestamp of "2023-11-23 03:23:32 UTC" and a disclaimer stating, "Advisory: We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain." Overlaid on the right side of the screen is a Twitch chat window with messages from users "rogert" and "Nightbot." Rogert writes, "i think if you are a team signing Ohantu, you are going all in on everyone you can," and Nightbot provides a link for "BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE." In the bottom right corner, a webcam feed shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt, looking toward the camera. At the bottom of the browser, a banner for "CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible. The scene remains static across all frames.
